title: Substance analyzer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''substance analyzer'''<ref name="HSCS">''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''</ref> or '''sample analyzer''' was a type of [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]]<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> that looked for anomalies<ref name="NEGWT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> and identified [[Poison/Legends|poisons]], toxins, and unknown compounds.<ref name="EGWT" /> [[Food analyzer]]s were a specialized version of the substance analyzer.<ref name="NEGWT" /> These analyzers were common in [[Medpac/Legends|medpacs]] such as [[BioTech Industries/Legends|BioTech's]] [[FastFlesh medpac/Legends|FastFlesh medpac]].<ref name="EGWT" /> The [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[Survivor]] [[lifeboat]] was equipped with substance analyzers as part of the [[Starship/Legends|craft's]] survival equipment.<ref name="HSCS" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-11-XX -->''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''
*<!-- 1997-11-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''
*<!-- 2002-10-XX -->''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]''
*<!-- 2004-10-26 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''
